allow: PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\USUARIO\\Downloads\\MATRIZ PERCEPCIÓN DE LA LOCALIDAD.xlsx"; $dst = "$env:TEMP\\matriz_unzip"; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dst }; Expand-Archive -Path $src -DestinationPath $dst; Get-ChildItem -Recurse $dst | Select-Object FullName)

PowerShell($src = "C:\\Users\\USUARIO\\Downloads\\MATRIZ PERCEPCIÓN DE LA LOCALIDAD.xlsx"; $tmp = "$env:TEMP\\matriz.zip"; Copy-Item $src $tmp -Force; $dst = "$env:TEMP\\matriz_unzip"; if \(Test-Path $dst\) { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force $dst }; Expand-Archive -Path $tmp -DestinationPath $dst; Get-ChildItem -Recurse $dst | Select-Object -Expand FullName)
